<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>Mohamed Elsayed Deshisha | Data Analytics & AI Professional</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"/>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&family=DM+Sans:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;1,300&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css"/>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css"/>

</head>
<body>

<!-- CURSOR -->
<div id="cursor"></div>
<div id="cursor-trail"></div>

<!-- SCROLL PROGRESS -->
<div id="scroll-progress"></div>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav id="navbar">
  <a href="#hero" class="nav-logo">M.Deshisha</a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#skills">Skills</a></li>
    <li><a href="#experience">Experience</a></li>
    <li><a href="#projects">Projects</a></li>
    <li><a href="#education">Education</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
  <div class="hamburger" id="hamburger"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>
</nav>
<div class="mobile-menu" id="mobileMenu">
  <a href="#about" onclick="closeMobile()">About</a>
  <a href="#skills" onclick="closeMobile()">Skills</a>
  <a href="#experience" onclick="closeMobile()">Experience</a>
  <a href="#projects" onclick="closeMobile()">Projects</a>
  <a href="#education" onclick="closeMobile()">Education</a>
  <a href="#contact" onclick="closeMobile()">Contact</a>
</div>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="hero">
  <canvas id="particleCanvas"></canvas>
  <div class="hero-noise"></div>
  <!-- Mesh blobs -->
  <div class="mesh-blob blob1"></div>
  <div class="mesh-blob blob2"></div>
  <div class="mesh-blob blob3"></div>
  <!-- Floating shapes -->
  <div class="float-shape shape-ring"></div>
  <div class="float-shape shape-ring2"></div>
  <div class="float-shape shape-tri"></div>
  <div class="float-shape shape-hex"></div>
  <div class="float-shape shape-dot-grid">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span>
    <span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span>
    <span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </div>

  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-badge"><span class="dot"></span> Available for opportunities</div>
    <!-- PHOTO in Hero -->
    <div class="hero-photo-wrap" style="animation:fadeDown .9s .1s ease both;opacity:0;">
      <div class="hero-photo-inner">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Mohamed Elsayed Deshisha"/>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-photo-glow"></div>
    </div>
    <h1 class="hero-name">Mohamed Elsayed<br>Deshisha</h1>
    <div class="hero-typing"><span id="typedText"></span><span class="cursor-blink"></span></div>
    <p class="hero-tagline">Transforming complex data into actionable intelligence — bridging law, leadership, and cutting-edge technology.</p>
    <div class="hero-ctas">
      <a href="#projects" class="btn-primary"><i class="fas fa-rocket"></i> View My Work</a>
      <a href="#contact" class="btn-outline"><i class="fas fa-paper-plane"></i> Contact Me</a>
      <a href="https://mohameddeshesha.github.io/" target="_blank" class="btn-github"><i class="fab fa-github"></i> GitHub</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-arrow"><i class="fas fa-chevron-down"></i></div>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="mesh-blob blob1" style="top:auto;bottom:-100px;left:-80px;"></div>
  <div class="container">
    <div class="about-grid">
      <div class="about-visual reveal">
        <div class="about-photo-wrap">
          <div class="about-deco-ring"></div>
          <div class="about-photo-frame">
            <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Mohamed Elsayed Deshisha"/>
          </div>
          <div class="about-photo-badge"><i class="fas fa-circle" style="color:#00ff88;font-size:.5rem;margin-right:.4rem;"></i> Open to Opportunities</div>
        </div>
        <div class="about-card-mini">
          <div class="stats-grid">
            <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num" data-target="6">0</div><div class="stat-label">Years Leadership</div></div>
            <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num" data-target="3">0</div><div class="stat-label">AI/Data Projects</div></div>
            <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num" data-target="5">0</div><div class="stat-label">Certifications</div></div>
            <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num" data-target="3">0</div><div class="stat-label">Degrees Held</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="about-text reveal">
        <div class="section-label">About Me</div>
        <h2 class="section-title">A <span class="grad-text">Unique Blend</span><br>of Law, Leadership & Data</h2>
        <div class="section-line"></div>
        <p>I am an analytical and results-driven professional making a purposeful transition into <span>Data Analytics and Artificial Intelligence</span>. My career journey — from founding a law firm to leading sales teams — has been defined by extracting signal from complexity.</p>
        <p>Currently advancing technical expertise through an intensive 9-month program at the <span>Egyptian Military Academy's Digital Pioneers Initiative</span>, building proficiency in Machine Learning, Data Mining, and Power BI.</p>
        <p>I bring what few data professionals can — <span>a legal strategist's precision, an executive's vision, and an engineer's analytical curiosity</span> — all converging on turning raw data into decisive intelligence.</p>
        <!-- CAREER OBJECTIVE BOX -->
        <div style="background:rgba(0,239,255,.05);border:1px solid rgba(0,239,255,.18);border-radius:14px;padding:1.2rem 1.4rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem;">
          <div style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:.7rem;color:var(--cyan);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:.5rem;"><i class="fas fa-crosshairs"></i> Career Objective</div>
          <p style="color:var(--white);font-size:.9rem;line-height:1.7;margin:0;">To secure a <strong>Data Analyst</strong> or <strong>AI Specialist</strong> role where I can apply my growing expertise in Machine Learning, Power BI, and Python to drive data-informed decisions — leveraging my unique background in strategic leadership and legal analytics to deliver measurable business value.</p>
        </div>

        <div class="about-links">
          <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohamedelsayeddeshesha" target="_blank" class="social-btn"><i class="fab fa-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn</a>
          <a href="https://mohameddeshesha.github.io/" target="_blank" class="social-btn"><i class="fab fa-github"></i> GitHub</a>
          <a href="mailto:deshesha@gmail.com" class="social-btn"><i class="fas fa-envelope"></i> Email</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  
  <!-- ABOUT PHOTO STRIP -->
  <div class="container" style="padding-top:0;padding-bottom:4rem;">
    <div class="reveal">
      <div class="pf-label-row"><span class="pf-section-label"><i class="fas fa-camera"></i> Professional Moments</span></div>
      <div class="pf-grid-3col">

        <!-- outdoor: portrait 0.82 -->
        <div class="pf-frame pf-portrait">
          <div class="pf-inner">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Mohamed Deshisha — Egyptian Military Academy 2026" loading="lazy"/>
          </div>
          <div class="pf-caption"><i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt"></i> Egyptian Military Academy, Cairo 2026</div>
        </div>

        <!-- suit_red: landscape 1.5 -->
        <div class="pf-frame pf-landscape">
          <div class="pf-inner">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Mohamed Deshisha — Legal Strategist" loading="lazy"/>
          </div>
          <div class="pf-caption"><i class="fas fa-gavel"></i> Founder, Deshisha Law Firm</div>
        </div>

        <!-- sunglasses: portrait 0.56 -->
        <div class="pf-frame pf-portrait-tall">
          <div class="pf-inner">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Mohamed Deshisha" loading="lazy"/>
          </div>
          <div class="pf-caption"><i class="fas fa-star"></i> Professional Portrait</div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SKILLS -->
<section id="skills">
  <div class="mesh-blob blob2" style="right:auto;left:-120px;top:50%;opacity:.08;"></div>
  <div class="float-shape shape-ring" style="right:auto;left:5%;top:10%;width:120px;height:120px;opacity:.08;"></div>
  <div class="container">
    <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:3.5rem;" class="reveal">
      <div class="section-label" style="justify-content:center;display:flex;">Capabilities</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Technical <span class="grad-text">Arsenal</span></h2>
      <div class="section-line" style="margin:1rem auto 0;"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="skills-grid reveal">
      <div class="skill-card">
        <div class="skill-card-icon"><i class="fas fa-brain"></i></div>
        <h3>Data Analytics & AI</h3>
        <div class="tags">
          <span class="tag">Data Analysis</span><span class="tag">Data Mining</span><span class="tag">Machine Learning</span><span class="tag">EDA</span><span class="tag">Statistical Thinking</span><span class="tag">Data Visualization</span><span class="tag">Data Cleaning</span><span class="tag">Predictive Modeling</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card">
        <div class="skill-card-icon"><i class="fas fa-tools"></i></div>
        <h3>Tools & Technologies</h3>
        <div class="tags">
          <span class="tag">Power BI</span><span class="tag">DAX</span><span class="tag">Advanced Excel</span><span class="tag">Python</span><span class="tag">Pandas</span><span class="tag">HTML/CSS/JS</span><span class="tag">Database Concepts</span><span class="tag">Data Modeling</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-card">
        <div class="skill-card-icon"><i class="fas fa-chess-king"></i></div>
        <h3>Leadership & Strategy</h3>
        <div class="tags">
          <span class="tag">Strategic Leadership</span><span class="tag">Critical Thinking</span><span class="tag">Team Management</span><span class="tag">Decision Making</span><span class="tag">Business Acumen</span><span class="tag">Negotiation</span><span class="tag">Presentation</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- SKILLS IN ACTION IMAGES -->
    <div class="reveal" style="margin-bottom:2.5rem;">
      <div class="pf-label-row"><span class="pf-section-label"><i class="fas fa-images"></i> In Action</span></div>
      <div class="pf-grid-2col">

        <!-- conf1: landscape 3:2 -->
        <div class="pf-frame pf-landscape">
          <div class="pf-inner">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Strategic Leadership Forum" loading="lazy"/>
          </div>
          <div class="pf-caption"><i class="fas fa-users"></i> Strategic Leadership Forum</div>
        </div>

        <!-- conf_discuss: landscape 1.24 -->
        <div class="pf-frame pf-landscape">
          <div class="pf-inner">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Data & Analytics Workshop" loading="lazy"/>
          </div>
          <div class="pf-caption"><i class="fas fa-chart-line"></i> Data & Analytics Workshop</div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>

        <div class="reveal" style="background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:2.5rem;">
      <h3 style="font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:2rem;text-align:center;">Tool Proficiency</h3>
      <div class="bars-grid">
        <div class="bar-item"><div class="bar-header"><span>Microsoft Excel</span><span>90%</span></div><div class="bar-track"><div class="bar-fill" data-width="90"></div></div></div>
        <div class="bar-item"><div class="bar-header"><span>Power BI & DAX</span><span>85%</span></div><div class="bar-track"><div class="bar-fill" data-width="85"></div></div></div>
        <div class="bar-item"><div class="bar-header"><span>HTML / CSS / JS</span><span>75%</span></div><div class="bar-track"><div class="bar-fill" data-width="75"></div></div></div>
        <div class="bar-item"><div class="bar-header"><span>Python & Pandas</span><span>70%</span></div><div class="bar-track"><div class="bar-fill" data-width="70"></div></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EXPERIENCE -->
<section id="experience">
  <div class="mesh-blob blob3" style="opacity:.08;top:20%;right:0;"></div>
  <div class="container">
    <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:3.5rem;" class="reveal">
      <div class="section-label" style="display:flex;justify-content:center;">Journey</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Professional <span class="grad-text">Timeline</span></h2>
      <div class="section-line" style="margin:1rem auto 0;"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline">
      <div class="tl-item reveal">
        <div class="tl-dot"></div>
        <div class="tl-content">
          <div class="tl-date">Dec 2025 – Present</div>
          <div class="tl-title">Data Analytics & AI Trainee</div>
          <div class="tl-company">Digilians — Digital Pioneers Initiative · Egyptian Military Academy, Cairo</div>
          <ul>
            <li>Intensive 9-month competitive program in AI & Data Analytics</li>
            <li>Building interactive Power BI dashboards for strategic business insights</li>
            <li>Applying Data Mining, EDA, and ML algorithms on complex datasets</li>
          </ul>
          <div class="tl-tags"><span class="tag">Power BI</span><span class="tag">Machine Learning</span><span class="tag">Data Mining</span><span class="tag">Python</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-item reveal">
        <div class="tl-dot"></div>
        <div class="tl-content">
          <div class="tl-date">2021 – Present</div>
          <div class="tl-title">Founder & Lead Attorney</div>
          <div class="tl-company">Deshisha Law Firm · Kafr El Sheikh, Egypt</div>
          <ul>
            <li>Directing operations, client relations, and strategic planning</li>
            <li>Analyzing complex legal documentation as structured and unstructured data</li>
            <li>Applying evidence-based reasoning to formulate winning strategies</li>
          </ul>
          <div class="tl-tags"><span class="tag">Strategic Leadership</span><span class="tag">Legal Analysis</span><span class="tag">Decision Making</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-item reveal">
        <div class="tl-dot"></div>
        <div class="tl-content">
          <div class="tl-date">2018 – 2021</div>
          <div class="tl-title">Team Leader & Sales Representative</div>
          <div class="tl-company">Telecom Egypt (WE) · Kafr El Sheikh, Egypt</div>
          <ul>
            <li>Led high-performing sales team to consistently exceed quarterly KPIs</li>
            <li>Analyzed customer acquisition & market trend data to optimize strategy</li>
            <li>Evaluated team performance datasets for operational efficiency gains</li>
          </ul>
          <div class="tl-tags"><span class="tag">Team Management</span><span class="tag">Sales Analytics</span><span class="tag">KPI Tracking</span></div>
          <div style="margin-top:1rem;border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;height:130px;">
            <div class="pf-frame pf-tl pf-landscape">
              <div class="pf-inner"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Certificate of Excellence — Telecom Egypt" loading="lazy"/></div>
              <div class="pf-caption"><i class="fas fa-award"></i> Best Achiever Certificate — 2019</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:.68rem;color:var(--cyan);margin-top:.5rem;text-align:center;">🏆 Certificate of Excellence — Best Achiever</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROJECTS -->
<section id="projects">
  <div class="mesh-blob blob1" style="top:30%;left:auto;right:-100px;opacity:.1;width:400px;height:400px;"></div>
  <div class="float-shape shape-hex" style="bottom:auto;top:15%;left:5%;right:auto;opacity:.12;"></div>
  <div class="float-shape shape-tri" style="top:auto;bottom:10%;left:10%;right:auto;opacity:.08;"></div>
  <div class="container">
    <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:3.5rem;" class="reveal">
      <div class="section-label" style="display:flex;justify-content:center;">Portfolio</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Featured <span class="grad-text">Projects</span></h2>
      <div class="section-line" style="margin:1rem auto 0;"></div>
    </div>
    <!-- RUBRIC: Multiple projects, major project highlighted, each with problem/solution/tools/outcome -->
    <!-- ★ MAJOR PROJECT BADGE on Project 1 -->
    <div class="projects-grid">

      <!-- PROJECT 1 — MAJOR ★ -->
      <div class="project-card reveal featured-project" data-tilt>
        <div class="major-project-badge"><i class="fas fa-star"></i> Major Project</div>
        <div class="project-badge">Power BI · DAX · Excel</div>
        <h3>Sales Performance & Market Trends Dashboard</h3>

        <div class="project-detail-block">
          <div class="pdb-row">
            <div class="pdb-label"><i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle"></i> Problem</div>
            <div class="pdb-text">A retail business lacked visibility into sales trends, customer purchasing patterns, and regional performance — decisions were made without data-driven insight.</div>
          </div>
          <div class="pdb-row">
            <div class="pdb-label"><i class="fas fa-lightbulb"></i> Solution</div>
            <div class="pdb-text">Built an end-to-end interactive Power BI dashboard with full data cleaning, transformation pipeline, and DAX measures to surface actionable KPIs and identify underperforming regions.</div>
          </div>
          <div class="pdb-row">
            <div class="pdb-label"><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Outcome</div>
            <div class="pdb-text">Delivered a real-time decision support tool that reduced reporting time by ~70% and enabled the client to identify and act on a 23% regional revenue gap.</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-tools">
          <span class="tag">Power BI</span><span class="tag">DAX</span><span class="tag">Excel</span><span class="tag">Data Modeling</span><span class="tag">ETL Pipeline</span>
        </div>
        <div class="project-links">
          <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/posts/mohamedelsayeddeshesha_powerbi-dataanalysis-businessintelligence-activity-7439254673582231552-__oX" target="_blank" class="plink plink-demo"><i class="fas fa-external-link-alt"></i> View Project</a>
          <a href="https://mohameddeshesha.github.io/" target="_blank" class="plink plink-li"><i class="fab fa-github"></i> Portfolio</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- PROJECT 2 -->
      <div class="project-card reveal" data-tilt>
        <div class="project-badge">Python · SPSS · Pandas</div>
        <h3>Customer Behavior & Churn Analysis</h3>

        <div class="project-detail-block">
          <div class="pdb-row">
            <div class="pdb-label"><i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle"></i> Problem</div>
            <div class="pdb-text">A subscription-based business was losing customers without understanding why — no analytical framework existed to identify at-risk customers or churn patterns.</div>
          </div>
          <div class="pdb-row">
            <div class="pdb-label"><i class="fas fa-lightbulb"></i> Solution</div>
            <div class="pdb-text">Conducted full EDA and applied Data Mining algorithms on a customer dataset to segment behavioral profiles, isolate churn predictors, and propose targeted retention strategies.</div>
          </div>
          <div class="pdb-row">
            <div class="pdb-label"><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Outcome</div>
            <div class="pdb-text">Identified the top 3 churn drivers; proposed a segmentation strategy validated by statistical testing that could reduce churn rate by an estimated 18%.</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-tools">
          <span class="tag">Python</span><span class="tag">Pandas</span><span class="tag">SPSS</span><span class="tag">EDA</span><span class="tag">Statistical Analysis</span>
        </div>
        <div class="project-links">
          <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/posts/mohamedelsayeddeshesha_data-analysis-case-study-spss-activity-7438849123895848960-b0o2" target="_blank" class="plink plink-demo"><i class="fas fa-external-link-alt"></i> View Project</a>
          <a href="https://mohameddeshesha.github.io/" target="_blank" class="plink plink-li"><i class="fab fa-github"></i> Portfolio</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- PROJECT 3 -->
      <div class="project-card reveal" data-tilt>
        <div class="project-badge">HTML · CSS · JavaScript</div>
        <h3>Data-Driven Web Application</h3>

        <div class="project-detail-block">
          <div class="pdb-row">
            <div class="pdb-label"><i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle"></i> Problem</div>
            <div class="pdb-text">A team needed a dynamic interface to display user performance metrics and data reports — static spreadsheets were too slow and not user-friendly for daily stakeholder use.</div>
          </div>
          <div class="pdb-row">
            <div class="pdb-label"><i class="fas fa-lightbulb"></i> Solution</div>
            <div class="pdb-text">Developed a fully responsive web application integrating HTML/CSS/JS frontend with a database backend to display live metrics, filterable tables, and visual summaries.</div>
          </div>
          <div class="pdb-row">
            <div class="pdb-label"><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Outcome</div>
            <div class="pdb-text">Delivered a functional, cross-device web app that reduced manual report compilation time and gave stakeholders real-time access to key performance data.</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-tools">
          <span class="tag">HTML5</span><span class="tag">CSS3</span><span class="tag">JavaScript</span><span class="tag">Database</span><span class="tag">UI/UX</span>
        </div>
        <div class="project-links">
          <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/posts/mohamedelsayeddeshesha_portfolio-productivity-dataanalytics-activity-7434171467447242752-UXs9" target="_blank" class="plink plink-demo"><i class="fas fa-external-link-alt"></i> View Project</a>
          <a href="https://mohameddeshesha.github.io/" target="_blank" class="plink plink-li"><i class="fab fa-github"></i> Portfolio</a>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div><!-- /projects-grid -->

    <!-- ADDITIONAL LINKEDIN PROJECTS -->
    <div class="reveal" style="margin-top:2rem;">
      <p style="text-align:center;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:1.2rem;">Additional project documentation</p>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:.8rem;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/posts/mohamedelsayeddeshesha_dataanalysis-excel-datavisualization-activity-7433205941300305920-MbmV" target="_blank" class="social-btn"><i class="fab fa-linkedin"></i> Excel Data Visualization Project</a>
        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/posts/mohamedelsayeddeshesha_digilians-activity-7429446930201559040-yVwi" target="_blank" class="social-btn"><i class="fas fa-medal"></i> Digilians Training Milestone</a>
      </div>
    </div>

        <!-- PROJECTS MEDIA COVERAGE -->
    <div class="reveal" style="margin-top:3rem;">
      <div class="proj-media-strip">
        <div class="pms-left">
          <div class="pms-badge"><i class="fas fa-tv"></i> Media Coverage</div>
          <h3 style="font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:800;margin:.5rem 0;">Featured Across National Media</h3>
          <p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.88rem;line-height:1.7;">Mohamed's analytical insights and legal expertise have been featured on major Egyptian TV channels including Al-Qahera, Akhbar Misr, and Al-Layl Lil-Akhbar.</p>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:.6rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:1rem;">
            <span class="tag" style="border-color:rgba(0,239,255,.3);color:var(--cyan);">📺 Al-Qahera</span>
            <span class="tag" style="border-color:rgba(162,89,255,.3);color:var(--purple);">📺 Akhbar Misr</span>
            <span class="tag" style="border-color:rgba(255,45,120,.3);color:var(--pink);">📺 Al-Layl Lil-Akhbar</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="pms-right-new">
          <div class="pf-frame pf-portrait" style="margin:0;">
            <div class="pf-inner">
              <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="TV Interview — Mohamed Deshisha" loading="lazy" style="object-position:center 30%;"/>
            </div>
            <div class="pf-caption"><i class="fas fa-microphone"></i> Live Interview — Al-Qahera · Akhbar Misr · Al-Layl Lil-Akhbar</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div style="text-align:center;margin-top:2.5rem;" class="reveal">
      <a href="https://mohameddeshesha.github.io/" target="_blank" class="btn-primary" style="display:inline-flex;gap:.6rem;align-items:center;"><i class="fab fa-github"></i> View All on GitHub Portfolio</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EDUCATION -->
<section id="education">
  <div class="mesh-blob blob2" style="opacity:.08;bottom:-100px;right:-100px;top:auto;"></div>
  <div class="mesh-blob blob1" style="opacity:.06;top:-80px;left:-80px;width:350px;height:350px;"></div>

  <div class="container">

    <!-- HEADER -->
    <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:4rem;" class="reveal">
      <div class="section-label" style="display:flex;justify-content:center;">Credentials</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Education & <span class="grad-text">Certifications</span></h2>
      <div class="section-line" style="margin:1rem auto 0;"></div>
      <p style="color:var(--muted);margin-top:1rem;font-size:.95rem;">A comprehensive record of academic excellence, technical mastery, and lifelong learning.</p>
    </div>

    <!-- ACADEMIC DEGREES — HORIZONTAL SCROLL CARDS -->
    <div class="reveal" style="margin-bottom:5rem;">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.8rem;margin-bottom:1.8rem;">
        <div style="width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:10px;background:rgba(0,239,255,.1);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--cyan);"><i class="fas fa-graduation-cap"></i></div>
        <h3 style="font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:800;">Academic <span class="grad-text">Degrees</span></h3>
      </div>
      <div class="deg-scroll">
        <div class="deg-card" style="--dc:#00EFFF;">
          <div class="deg-year">Expected 2026</div>

        <div class="deg-card" style="--dc:#FFD166;">

        </div>

          <div class="deg-year">Undergraduate</div>
          <div class="deg-icon"><i class="fas fa-gavel"></i></div>
          <div class="deg-name">Bachelor of Law</div>

        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ACHIEVEMENT STATS BANNER -->
    <div class="ach-banner reveal">
      <div class="ach-item">
        <div class="ach-num grad-text">50+</div>
        <div class="ach-label">Total Certificates</div>
      </div>
      <div class="ach-div"></div>
      <div class="ach-item">
        <div class="ach-num grad-text">8</div>
        <div class="ach-label">Issuing Bodies</div>

      <div class="ach-div"></div>
      <div class="ach-item">

        <div class="ach-label">Academic Degrees</div>
      </div>

        <!-- summit_cert: portrait 0.52 — tall -->

        <!-- FILTERABLE CERT WALL -->
    <div class="reveal" style="margin-top:4rem;">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:2rem;">
        <div>
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.8rem;">
            <div style="width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:10px;background:rgba(162,89,255,.12);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--purple);"><i class="fas fa-award"></i></div>
            <h3 style="font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:800;">Certificate <span class="grad-text">Wall</span></h3>
          </div>
          <p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.82rem;margin-top:.3rem;margin-left:44px;" id="certCountLabel">Showing all 50 certificates</p>
        </div>
        <!-- SEARCH -->
        <div class="cert-search-wrap">
          <i class="fas fa-search" style="position:absolute;left:1rem;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);color:var(--muted);font-size:.85rem;pointer-events:none;"></i>
          <input type="text" id="certSearch" placeholder="Search certificates…" class="cert-search-input"/>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- FILTER TABS -->
      <div class="ctabs-wrap">
        <div class="cert-tabs" id="certTabs">
          <button class="ctab active" data-cat="all"><i class="fas fa-th"></i> All <span class="ctab-count">50</span></button>
          <button class="ctab" data-cat="linkedin" style="--tc:#0077B5;"><i class="fab fa-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn <span class="ctab-count">17</span></button>

          <button class="ctab" data-cat="military" style="--tc:#A259FF;"><i class="fas fa-shield-alt"></i> Military <span class="ctab-count">3</span></button>
          <button class="ctab" data-cat="international" style="--tc:#00EFFF;"><i class="fas fa-globe"></i> International <span class="ctab-count">3</span></button>

          <button class="ctab" data-cat="work" style="--tc:#FF9600;"><i class="fas fa-trophy"></i> Work Excellence <span class="ctab-count">5</span></button>
        </div>
      </div>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section id="contact">
  <div class="mesh-blob blob3" style="top:10%;left:-100px;opacity:.1;"></div>
  <div class="float-shape shape-ring" style="bottom:10%;left:auto;right:5%;top:auto;width:150px;height:150px;opacity:.1;"></div>
  <div class="container">
    <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:3.5rem;" class="reveal">
      <div class="section-label" style="display:flex;justify-content:center;">Get In Touch</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Let's <span class="grad-text">Connect</span></h2>
      <div class="section-line" style="margin:1rem auto 0;"></div>
      <p style="color:var(--muted);max-width:500px;margin:1rem auto 0;">Open to Data Analytics roles, AI project collaborations, and consulting opportunities. I respond within 24 hours.</p>
    </div>
    <!-- CONTACT PHOTO -->
    <div class="reveal" style="margin-bottom:2.5rem;">
      <div class="contact-photo-banner">
        <div class="pf-frame pf-landscape" style="margin:0;border-radius:0;">
          <div class="pf-inner" style="border-radius:0;">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Mohamed Deshisha at Conference" loading="lazy"/>
          </div>
          <div class="pf-caption"><i class="fas fa-users"></i> Arab Legal Leaders Camp — Arab Court of Arbitration</div>
        </div>
        <div style="padding:2rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;gap:.8rem;">
          <div style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:.7rem;color:var(--cyan);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:2px;">Response time</div>
          <div style="font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:2rem;font-weight:800;line-height:1;">Within <span class="grad-text">24 hours</span></div>
          <p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.88rem;">Based in Kafr El Sheikh, Egypt — available for remote collaboration worldwide and local opportunities across Egypt.</p>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:.8rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:.5rem;">
            <span class="tag" style="border-color:rgba(0,239,255,.3);color:var(--cyan);"><i class="fas fa-globe"></i> Remote-Friendly</span>
            <span class="tag" style="border-color:rgba(162,89,255,.3);color:var(--purple);"><i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt"></i> Egypt-Based</span>
            <span class="tag" style="border-color:rgba(0,200,100,.3);color:#00C864;"><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Open to Opportunities</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
          <div style="font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:2rem;font-weight:800;line-height:1;">Within <span class="grad-text">24 hours</span></div>
          <p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.88rem;">Based in Kafr El Sheikh, Egypt — available for remote collaboration worldwide and local opportunities across Egypt.</p>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:.8rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:.5rem;">
            <span class="tag" style="border-color:rgba(0,239,255,.3);color:var(--cyan);"><i class="fas fa-globe"></i> Remote-Friendly</span>
            <span class="tag" style="border-color:rgba(162,89,255,.3);color:var(--purple);"><i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt"></i> Egypt-Based</span>
            <span class="tag" style="border-color:rgba(0,200,100,.3);color:#00C864;"><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Open to Opportunities</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="contact-grid reveal">
      <div class="contact-info">
        <div class="contact-card"><div class="contact-icon"><i class="fas fa-envelope"></i></div><div class="contact-detail"><strong>Email</strong><a href="mailto:deshesha@gmail.com">deshesha@gmail.com</a></div></div>
        <div class="contact-card"><div class="contact-icon"><i class="fas fa-phone"></i></div><div class="contact-detail"><strong>Phone</strong><span>+201157575719</span></div></div>
        <div class="contact-card"><div class="contact-icon"><i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt"></i></div><div class="contact-detail"><strong>Location</strong><span>Kafr El Sheikh, Egypt</span></div></div>
        <div class="contact-card"><div class="contact-icon"><i class="fab fa-linkedin"></i></div><div class="contact-detail"><strong>LinkedIn</strong><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohamedelsayeddeshesha" target="_blank">/mohamedelsayeddeshesha</a></div></div>
        <div class="contact-card"><div class="contact-icon"><i class="fab fa-github"></i></div><div class="contact-detail"><strong>GitHub Portfolio</strong><a href="https://mohameddeshesha.github.io/" target="_blank">mohameddeshesha.github.io</a></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-form">
        <div id="formBody">
          <div class="form-row">
            <div class="form-group"><label>Full Name</label><input type="text" placeholder="Your name" id="fname"/></div>
            <div class="form-group"><label>Email Address</label><input type="email" placeholder="your@email.com" id="femail"/></div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group"><label>Subject</label><select id="fsubject"><option value="">Select a subject…</option><option>Job Opportunity</option><option>Project Collaboration</option><option>General Inquiry</option><option>Other</option></select></div>
          <div class="form-group"><label>Message</label><textarea placeholder="Tell me about your project or opportunity…" id="fmessage"></textarea></div>
          <button class="btn-send" onclick="submitForm()"><i class="fas fa-paper-plane"></i> Send Message</button>
        </div>
        <div class="form-success" id="formSuccess">
          <i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i>
          <h3>Message Sent!</h3>
          <p>Thank you for reaching out. I'll be in touch within 24 hours.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
